name: ProviderStuff
overview: Applies provider tags, manages provider collections, and exposes provider/item APIs with pagination.
description: ProviderStuff automates tagging items with provider:<name> tags, maintains optional Box Set collections, and provides API endpoints to list providers and items. This fork adds Jellyfin 10.11 compatibility.
changelog: 1.3.0.0 - Fix for Jellyfin 10.11: replaced removed GetItemList() API with GetItemListResult().Items

versions.changelog: Fix for Jellyfin 10.11 compatibility: ILibraryManager.GetItemList() was removed in 10.11. Replaced with GetItemListResult().Items. All other functionality identical to upstream 1.2.0.0.
